name: Customer group bound to the loyalty campaign (the 2nd bind)
description: The second of the two binds Section 3 requires per promotion: PUT .../campaigns/Salesforce-Loyalty-Campaign/customer_groups/CG-SFloyalty-20OFFLEGO. This is the link that scopes the persistent campaign to members of the dynamic gating group, pair it with 01 (the promotion bind).
notes: Two binds per promotion, both to the ONE indefinite campaign: 01 assigns the promotion (campaign_promotion_assignment); this assigns the customer group (campaign_customer_group_assignment). Together they make the campaign active for sessions whose loyaltyPromotions contains the code, running the PMID's discount only for gated members.
